mapper.sql: id, user_id, platform, open_id, union_id, nickname, avatar_url, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_user_oauth WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND platform = #{platform} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_user_oauth WHERE platform = #{platform} AND open_id = #{openId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_user_oauth (user_id, platform, open_id, union_id, nickname, avatar_url, create_time, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{platform}, #{openId}, #{unionId}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_user_oauth SET open_id = #{openId}, union_id = #{unionId}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_user_oauth SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND platform = #{platform} AND deleted = 0
